name: The Dive Squad (Super hero rpg)
description: In a world of cyberpunk and futurism, there’s always some reason to cause chaos, so who else to help but the Dive Squad. A group of teens and young adults with powers, weapons, and mutations that help out whenever the time strikes. They usually appear within floating train carts, jumping out from them and diving head first into the scene. You may play as your own hero and save the world with your squad just make sure to land on your feet. When your off duty your at attendance at the dive school, training, learning, and resting.
creator: Mushmoth
